title: APC UPS SNMP Power Factor Trending
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-7d
| eval pf=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvOutputPowerFactor, output_power_factor, ""))/100
| where isnotnull(pf)
| timechart span=1h avg(pf) by ups_name
description: Declining power factor at the UPS output can signal upstream harmonics or mis-sized loads increasing electrical losses.
value: Guides electrical remediation and rightsizing projects.
implementation: (1) Confirm scaling factor in MIB. (2) Correlate with PDU PF if metered.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Power spikes during equipment power cycling, scheduled load shifting, or DR drills.
